message:
chore(golden): regenerate stale quarantine goldens after peer inspection-id + full-quarantine adds

bfe360f4 added inspection_required_generation_ids to the quarantine
summary; b494a6e9 expanded status --json to emit the full quarantine
report (not just the summary). Neither commit regenerated the
affected golden files, so running `cargo test --test golden_robot_json`
on clean HEAD failed on:
- diag_quarantine_json_matches_golden
- doctor_quarantine_json_matches_golden
- status_quarantine_json_matches_golden
- status_quarantine_full_json_matches_golden

Regenerated via UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --test golden_robot_json.
Diff is additive-only: new inspection_required_generation_ids key and
new quarantined_artifacts array wired into status envelopes. Existing
fields unchanged. Re-run without UPDATE_GOLDENS passes all 28 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
